Options.OPTION[CitiesSkylines2Mod.Button: Show or hide the Tax & Production button in the toolbar. You can re-enable it here if hidden.
Options.OPTION[CitiesSkylines2Mod.Defaul: The initial tax rate applied when a new game session starts.
Options.OPTION[CitiesSkylines2Mod.DebugM: Write verbose mod events to the game log. Useful for troubleshooting.
Options.OPTION[CitiesSkylines2Mod.ResetD: Restore all settings to their default values.
Options.OPTION[CitiesSkylines2Mod.OpenSo: Open the mod's GitHub repository in your browser.
